description: This file implements a Cognito JWT authorizer class for validating JWT tokens issued by AWS Cognito, including fetching JWKS, verifying signatures, and checking token claims.

classes.name: CognitoAuthorizer
classes.description: A class that extends IdpAuthorizerAbstractClass to validate JWT tokens issued by AWS Cognito, including signature verification and claim validation.

methods.name: validateJWT
methods.description: Validates a JWT token from the event, fetching JWKS, verifying the signature, and checking token claims.

methods.name: __validateCognitoJWT
methods.description: Performs the actual JWT signature verification and claim validation using the public keys.
